---
title: WallyTutor | Walter Dal'Maz Silva
subtitle: Professional Portfolio & Technical Research

description: |
    Personal portfolio, curriculum vitae, and research notes of
    Walter Dal'Maz Silva, Ph.D. specializing in physical and
    data-driven modeling.

keywords:
  - "Walter Dal'Maz Silva"
  - WallyTutor
  - Materials Science
  - Data Science
  - Physical Modeling
  - Scientific Computing

format:
  html:
    logo: _assets/logo.svg
    css: _assets/index.css
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    margin-left: auto
    margin-right: auto
    max-width: 960px
---

## Contents

- [Curriculum](curriculum/curriculum.html)

### Shorts

- [How Many More Points?](shorts/recursive-mean.html)
